title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
